description.en: A tiny, elusive armadillo that looks like a walking sushi with its pink shell and white fur.
description.zh: 一种微小且神秘的犰狳，因其粉红色的外壳和白色的皮毛，看起来像一块「会走路的握寿司」。

anatomy.en: It is only about 10 cm long. Its pink shell is attached to its body by a thin membrane and helps regulate body temperature.
anatomy.zh: 它只有约 10 厘米长。它的粉红色外壳通过薄膜附着在身上，有助于调节体温。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Nicknamed the 「sand swimmer」, it can burrow through dry soil as fast as a fish swims in water. It eats mostly ants.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它被昵称为「沙泳者」，在干旱土壤中挖掘的速度就像鱼在水里游泳一样快。它主要吃蚂蚁。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Endemic to central Argentina, living in dry grasslands and sandy plains.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 阿根廷中部特有，生活在干旱草原和沙质平原上。
